codeReview.summary: The CRUD implementation is substantial and aligns on validation/encryption/audit shape, but it has blocking authorization gaps: API-key scope enforcement is missing on all mutation/read handlers, and viewer date-range scoping is not enforced on GET.

issues.description: POST and GET do not enforce API-key scopes (no enforceScope checks), so API keys without appropriate health scopes can create/read annotations. This violates least-privilege behavior and diverges from established route patterns that gate API-key access by scope.
PATCH and DELETE also omit API-key scope checks, allowing API-key principals lacking write scope to mutate annotation data. Owner-role checks alone are insufficient when authMethod is api_key.

Viewer access is filtered by metric mapping only, but date range is taken directly from request without clamping to grant dataStart/dataEnd. This can expose annotations outside the viewer's permitted time window.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS API-route conventions document role checks and validation, but not API-key scope enforcement or viewer date-range clamping requirements for data endpoints.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/weae1504/.factory/missions/db9d835a-f2b6-43c1-b3f9-be45e7a2a25a/AGENTS.md:22-25 (auth guidance only), contrasted with missing scope/clamp logic in apps/web/src/app/api/annotations/route.ts:77-237 and apps/web/src/app/api/annotations/[id]/route.ts:67-228

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill says to read shares/health-data route patterns and follow LLD exactly, but lacks an explicit checklist item to preserve API-key scope checks and viewer grant date clamping when implementing new endpoints.

Feature acceptance criteria emphasize CRUD, validation, encryption, and audit events but do not explicitly call out API-key scope enforcement, which reduced the chance of catching auth-scope regressions during implementation/review.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/weae1504/.factory/missions/db9d835a-f2b6-43c1-b3f9-be45e7a2a25a/features.json:623-637; annotation tests contain no API-key scope assertions (apps/web/src/app/api/annotations/__tests__/route.test.ts)

summary: Reviewed feature annotation-crud-api (commit 0fde193) by inspecting feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, worker skill context, and commit diff. Found blocking authorization defects: missing API-key scope enforcement across CRUD handlers and missing viewer date-range clamping on GET. Marking the feature as fail until these security/permission gaps are fixed.
